plan: Contact customer service and state the intent to return two items: an air purifier and a vacuum cleaner from a recent order.
When asked for the order ID, provide **9502126**.
If the agent asks to double-check the order ID, correct it to **9502127**.
If **9502127** also fails, clarify the order ID is **W9502127** (prepend the missing 'W').
When asked which vacuum cleaner to return, specify the **canister** vacuum cleaner.
Express impatience and explicitly request the refund be processed **within 3 days**.
Ask the agent to confirm the **total refund amount** to expect for the two returned items.
Once the return is confirmed, ask the agent for the **total amount paid for the remaining items** in the same order (i.e., the order total minus the returned items).
